title: Rotating Skull on Fire Painting
description: Makes the burning skull painting rotate
body:
Based on the vanilla tweaks version. edited to match vanilla more closely. It should work in most versions as well just ignore the error and see

Tweet that started it
https://twitter.com/Zetterstrand/status/1635769147790426113

![](https://i.imgur.com/Fz4rp3z.gif)


Feel free to use anywhere just give credit to me and [vanilla tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/)
